description: Immerse yourself in the enchanting streets of Paris, where every corner tells a story and every café invites you to sit and savor the moment. This 4-day journey is designed for couples who wish to explore the charm of the City of Light, with a special focus on the delightful spots featured in 'Emily in Paris'. From iconic landmarks to hidden gems, prepare for a romantic adventure filled with culture, history, and breathtaking views.

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Le Consulat, a charming café in Montmartre. Enjoy a classic French breakfast of croissants and café au lait while soaking in the artistic atmosphere of this historic area.

After breakfast, head to the iconic Sacré-Cœur Basilica. Climb the steps to the dome for breathtaking views of Paris. The stunning architecture and serene ambiance make it a perfect spot for some quiet reflection.

activities.activity: Lunch at Le Refuge des Fondus
activities.description: For lunch, enjoy a unique dining experience at Le Refuge des Fondus, known for its fondue served in a cozy, quirky setting. Don't forget to try their famous wine served in baby bottles!

Stroll through Place du Tertre, the heart of Montmartre's artistic community. Here, you can find local artists showcasing their work and even get a portrait done. It's a vibrant area filled with color and creativity.
Take a short walk to the Musée de l'Orangerie to admire Monet's stunning Water Lilies. This museum offers a peaceful retreat and a chance to appreciate some of the finest Impressionist art.
End your day with a cozy dinner at Chez Janou, a Provençal restaurant with a lovely courtyard. Savor traditional dishes like ratatouille and finish off with their famous chocolate mousse.

After dinner, take a leisurely stroll through the charming streets of Montmartre. The area is beautifully lit at night, and you can enjoy the lively atmosphere and perhaps catch some street performances.
Start your day at the iconic Café de Flore, a favorite of artists and intellectuals. Enjoy a classic French breakfast with croissants and café au lait in a charming atmosphere.

Visit the world-renowned Louvre Museum, home to thousands of works of art including the Mona Lisa. Take your time exploring the vast galleries and enjoy the stunning architecture of the museum itself.
Enjoy a leisurely lunch at Le Fumoir, located near the Louvre. This stylish bistro offers a variety of French dishes in a cozy setting, perfect for a midday break.
Stroll through the beautiful gardens of Palais Royal, a serene escape in the heart of the city. Take in the stunning architecture and perhaps stop by the unique shops in the arcades.

activities.activity: Shopping for Emily in Paris Merchandise
activities.description: Head to the nearby boutiques and shops to find exclusive Emily in Paris merchandise. Look for unique souvenirs and fan gear that celebrate your favorite show.
Visit the stunning Pont Alexandre III, known for its ornate design and beautiful views of the Seine River. It's a perfect spot for photos and to soak in the Parisian atmosphere.

activities.activity: Dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte
activities.description: Indulge in a classic French dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte, famous for its steak-frites and secret sauce. Enjoy a cozy dining experience that captures the essence of Parisian cuisine.
Start your day at the iconic Café de Flore, a favorite of artists and intellectuals. Enjoy a classic French breakfast of croissants and café au lait in a charming atmosphere.

Stroll through the picturesque streets of Saint-Germain-des-Prés, known for its chic boutiques and art galleries. Don't forget to stop by the famous bookshop, Shakespeare and Company, for some literary souvenirs.
Enjoy lunch at Les Deux Magots, another historic café where famous writers once gathered. Savor traditional French dishes while soaking in the vibrant atmosphere.

activities.activity: Visit Île de la Cité and Notre-Dame Cathedral
activities.description: Head to Île de la Cité to admire the stunning Notre-Dame Cathedral. Although the interior is currently closed for restoration, the exterior and surrounding area are still breathtaking.
Take a leisurely walk through the beautiful Jardin des Tuileries. Enjoy the lush gardens and perhaps grab a snack from a nearby vendor while you relax by the fountains.

activities.activity: Dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte
activities.description: Indulge in a classic French dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte, famous for its steak-frites and secret sauce. A perfect way to end your day in Paris.
Cap off your day with a romantic Seine River cruise. Enjoy the illuminated landmarks of Paris from the water, creating unforgettable memories together.
Start your day at the iconic Café de Flore, a favorite haunt of artists and intellectuals. Enjoy a classic French breakfast of croissants and café au lait in a charming atmosphere.
Take a leisurely walk down the famous Champs-Élysées, lined with shops and cafés. This grand avenue is perfect for window shopping and soaking in the Parisian vibe.
Indulge in a delightful lunch at Ladurée, known for its exquisite macarons. Enjoy a light meal in a beautifully decorated setting, perfect for a romantic outing.
Head to Galeries Lafayette for some shopping. This stunning department store offers a wide range of fashion, beauty, and souvenirs, including plenty of Emily in Paris-themed merchandise.
Explore the opulent Palais Garnier, a masterpiece of architecture. Take a guided tour to learn about its rich history and stunning interiors, a must-see for culture lovers.

activities.activity: Dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte
activities.description: Enjoy a classic French dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte, famous for its steak-frites and secret sauce. A perfect way to end your Parisian adventure before departure.
